Ergonomic Mouse

Local fixture product page.

Reviews

Henry ★★★★☆

Reduced wrist strain for me. Took a week to adjust but worth it.

Isabella ★★★☆☆

Comfortable shape. Buttons are a little loud.

Michael ★★★★☆

Good build quality. Scroll wheel is smooth and consistent.

Emma ★★★☆☆

Nice ergonomics, but it's slightly too large for small hands.
